content: In most cases, the ambulance will not stop to help the person it ran over, as its primary mission is to reach the original emergency location. However, the ambulance crew will typically call for additional emergency services to respond to the new incident, and may provide basic care to the person they hit if it is safe to do so without compromising the original mission.
